entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., a cereal crop investigated for food and feed traits

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of grain in pearl millet

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of stover in pearl millet

entities.name: STOVER PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the stover of pearl millet

entities.name: STOVER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The extent to which pearl millet stover can be digested, measured in vitro and in vivo

entities.name: YIELD OF DIGESTIBLE STOVER
entities.description: The total amount of digestible stover produced per unit area

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to increase the frequency of desirable alleles in a population through repeated selection cycles

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: Animals used to test the digestibility, intake, and nitrogen balance of pearl millet stover

entities.name: DIGESTIBLE ORGANIC MATTER INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of organic matter from stover that is digested and absorbed by sheep

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE
entities.description: The difference between nitrogen intake and nitrogen excretion in sheep fed on stover

entities.name: DUAL-PURPOSE USAGE
entities.description: The utilization of a crop variety for both grain (food) and stover (feed)

entities.name: FOOD-FEED TRAITS
entities.description: Combined traits relating to the quality of the crop for both human consumption and animal fodder
